prompt: Cute watercolor anime-style portrait illustration of a handsome young man with soft wavy dark hair and oversized transparent round glasses, resting his chin on his hand with a warm gentle smile. Large sparkling expressive eyes, subtle rosy cheeks, soft pastel skin tones, delicate ink sketch outlines, whimsical watercolor splashes and stains. Wearing a vibrant bright orange button-up shirt with realistic watercolor shading and relaxed fabric folds. Botanical background with hanging green vines and leaves, soft peach, cream and warm orange watercolor washes. Tiny hand-drawn hearts and stars scattered around the composition. Hand-painted paper texture, dreamy aesthetic, cozy and uplifting mood, highly detailed watercolor brushwork, storybook illustration style, elegant and charming. Ultra-detailed anime watercolor art, clean white background, delicate watercolor blooms and splatters around the edges, soft natural lighting, warm color palette, adorable character design, high detail, vertical composition, professional watercolor journal illustration, whimsical and magical atmosphere.
